tools.name: fecred_check_obligation
tools.description: Check if an invoice to a given CUIT must be a Factura de Credito Electronica MiPyME (FCE). Returns obligado plus montoDesde, the live regime threshold from AFIP.

tools.name: fecred_list_received
tools.description: List FCEs received (or emitted) by the represented CUIT, with state filters. estadoCmp='Recepcionado' lists FCEs awaiting acceptance or rejection.

tools.name: fecred_accept_invoice
tools.description: Accept a received electronic credit invoice (FCE) and its cuenta corriente balance. Irreversible legal act: the FCE becomes a negotiable credit title.

tools.name: fecred_reject_invoice
tools.description: Reject a received electronic credit invoice (FCE) with at least one justified motivo de rechazo. Irreversible legal act, only valid inside the legal acceptance window.

tools.name: fecred_health
tools.description: Ping the AFIP WSFECred service (dummy operation). Returns appServer/dbServer/authServer statuses.
